ration with PBS, the skin was mounted on static vertical Franz Diffusion cells—Permegear Inc., Bethlehem, PA (receptor volume 5.1 ml, donor area 0.64 cm 2 ) by clamping them between the donor and receptor compartments. The receptor compartment was filled with PBS (pH 7.4) and maintained at 37 ± 0.5°C with constant stirring at 600 RPM. Formulations were added to the donor compartment as an infinite dose - for the gel formulations was determined using Fick’s law J = P × Cd − Cr . 1 where, J is the flux per unit area,
